data.raceComments: {"comment":"12. HARRYBEGOOD returns to his home track after a fair run in town last time out when finishing fifth of 10 at Randwick Kensington. Will appreciate the easier line-up here and has to be respected. 9. TUSCANY finished second as the hot favourite last start at the first run back from a spell over 1150m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Racing in a fitter state is worth considering. 10. WORLD WIDE went a bold race at odds of $81 on debut to finish third of seven over 1300m at Randwick Kensington last start after having raced on the speed into the turn. Fitter and racing in an easier line-up will be well supported to take this race out.","runners":[12,9,10],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: NEWCASTLE-R3-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
